message:
fix(clippy): resolve 6 clippy warnings across core modules

- capacity_governor: collapse nested if into single condition
- context_budget: derive Default instead of manual impl
- ingest: use saturating_sub for implicit subtraction
- intervention_console: derive Default instead of manual impl
- plan: derive Default instead of manual impl
- replay_capture: add Eq to derive alongside PartialEq

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
